samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">CLK_in</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">RST</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">CLK_50</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">CLK_10</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">CLK_1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_50.</description>
            <signal id="reset">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_CLK_in">Negative edge of CLK_in.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_RST">Negative edge of RST.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_50_reg">Register for CLK_50.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</signal>
            <signal id="RST">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</signal>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>reset</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST | ~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_CLK_in</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_RST</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_50_reg</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : neg_CLK_in ? ~CLK_50_reg : CLK_50_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_50</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : CLK_50_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_10.</description>
            <signal id="reset">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_CLK_in">Negative edge of CLK_in.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_RST">Negative edge of RST.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_10_reg">Register for CLK_10.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</signal>
            <signal id="RST">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</signal>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>reset</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST | ~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_CLK_in</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_RST</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_10_reg</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : neg_CLK_in ? ~CLK_10_reg : CLK_10_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_10</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : CLK_10_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_1.</description>
            <signal id="reset">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_CLK_in">Negative edge of CLK_in.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_RST">Negative edge of RST.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_1_reg">Register for CLK_1.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</signal>
            <signal id="RST">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</signal>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>reset</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST | ~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_CLK_in</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~CLK_in</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>neg_RST</lvalue>
                <rvalue>~RST</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_1_reg</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : neg_CLK_in ? ~CLK_1_reg : CLK_1_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <lvalue>CLK_1</lvalue>
                <rvalue>reset ? 1'b0 : CLK_1_reg</rvalue>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Reset logic for CLK_50: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set CLK_50 to 0. Otherwise, set CLK_50 to the inverse of its current value.
Reset logic for CLK_10: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set CLK_10 to 0 and the counter cnt_10 to 0. If the counter cnt_10 is equal to 4, set CLK_10 to the inverse of its current value and reset the counter cnt_10 to 0. Otherwise, increment the counter cnt_10 by 1.
Reset logic for CLK_1: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set CLK_1 to 0 and the counter cnt_100 to 0. If the counter cnt_100 is equal to 49, set CLK_1 to the inverse of its current value and reset the counter cnt_100 to 0. Otherwise, increment the counter cnt_100 by 1.</implementation>
</module>
